Advisement and Waiver - Waiver of Arraignment on Motion to Revoke
FELONY PLEA AND SENTENCING TRANSCRIPT FILED

/CAL:TO SET APD MTR & RECEIPT OF APD REPORT IN RE: NEW DEPAUL & CTS REPORT//MTR-APD/DEFT ADV/DEFT ADM VIO/REVSA:04-22-22/REIN ORIG TC/PROB MOD/PJ: 45DAYS/ADDL CTS:19/PROB EXT:09-18-22/4019HALF/CONTPROB/

/CAL:TO SET APD MTR & APD PROGRESS REPORT/DAWT/14    GPROGRESS REPORT/PROG:06-17-22/CTORD:APD SHALL PRODUCE A REPORT DETAILING THE FOLLOWING:/X:A NEW DEPAUL DATE IF THE DEFENDANT ADMITS ON 06-17-22/X:THE CUSTODY CREDIT THE DEFENDANT HAS ACCRUED SINCE 01-22-22/CONTD:RECEIPT OF REPORT & TO SET APD MTR/DOP/

/CAL:APD MTR/MTR-APD/DEFT ADV/DEFT ADM VIO/REVSA:01-07-22/REIN ORIG TC/PROB MOD/PJ:90 DAYS/ADDL CTS:18/4019HALF/X:REMAING COUNTY JAIL TIME STAYED PENDING SUCCESSFULL ENROLLMENT AND COMPLETION OF 10 INDIVIDUAL THERAPY SESSIONS, ANGER MANAGEMENT COURSE AT CASC, AND CITYWIDE CASE MANAGMENT,/ /X:AS ACONDITION OF RELEASE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE FOR 90 DAYS AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLYWITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH BY APD/PROBEXT:06-22-23/

/CAL: BENCH WARRANT RETURN (FTA 10-28-21 APD MTR FILING, 1ST BW)/BWDNC/OR/WEAP/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE, AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDERIN FILE,/DEF: ADMONISHED TO KEEP ELECTRONIC MONITORING CHARGED DAILY/WIAMTR/PROB ADM REV/CONTD SHORT FORM REPORT APD MTR/SUPP:01-21-22/CTORD:A SHORT FORM REPORT/S21/CONTD: TO SET APD MTR AND STATUS OF GPS IN S22/CONTD:SHORT FORM REPORT AND TO SET APD MTR IN S21/DOP/

/CAL SENTENCING/AJW/CH7 ISS PROB 3 Y PJ 88 D/CTS 88/DNA/PPRF/IND/VF4 300/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/CCC:5 AND 7/RESTV/SAORD/SA1:JOSE ALVAREZ, ALAN LE AND JUAN LOPEZ/SAORDS/SAORD3/SA4:SHELL GASSTATION, 388 POTRERO AVE, SF, CA AND MACYS, 170 O'FARRELL ST, SF, CA/CONTD:COMPLIANCE/DOP/

/CAL PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/X  THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAIT TO ADD COUNT #7, PC 664,487(A), A FELONY, IS GRANTED,/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:5, 7/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PPRF/REMA/VD:TRIAL DATE OF 041020 IN DEPARTMENT22/
